First of all, you need to learn HOW to use Arachne. Which is probably the most difficult Awakener to pilot. Just remember these 5 points. You must satisfy these steps.
1) have Weaver stacks (by playing the 0 card you receive from the 1cc Arachne card). You can store up to 3 stacks at your level of Enlightment 
2) u must have the Arachne exalt charged and ready to use. Do not use it now
3) activate Annihilation (take a card out from the ultra bar) OR you are in the ultra turn
4) USE ARACHNE EXALT 
5) Now, play cards of DIFFERENT Awakeners to activate Arachne pursuit 

If these points are not respected, your team will do VERY little damage. Also, unfortunately, to be impactful as DPS by herself, Arachne should be E3 and well invested

First of all, you need to learn HOW to use Arachne. Which is probably the most difficult Awakener to pilot. Just remember these 5 points. You must satisfy these steps.
1) have Weaver stacks (by playing the 0 card you receive from the 1cc Arachne card). You can store up to 3 stacks at your level of Enlightment 
2) u must have the Arachne exalt charged and ready to use. Do not use it now
3) activate Annihilation (take a card out from the ultra bar) OR you are in the ultra turn
4) USE ARACHNE EXALT 
5) Now, play cards of DIFFERENT Awakeners to activate Arachne pursuit 

If these points are not respected, your team will do VERY little damage. Also, unfortunately, to be impactful as DPS by herself, Arachne should be E3 and well invested
